name: Turkey Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 1 package White pepper or black pepper
2 tablespoons Fresh parsley, or 2 teaspoons dried parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. If there are no turkey leftovers, simmer turkey parts to provide the cooked meat.
2. Heat 2 teaspoons Margarine in a frying pan; saute mushrooms for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. Melt remaining margarine in a medium saucepan. Blend in flour until smooth. Add broth and milk, stirring briskly to remove any lumps. Bring to a boil; add sherry (or apple juice or extra broth) and seasonings. Continue cooking 2 to 3 minutes until thickened.
4. Cook spaghetti according to package directions. Drain.
5. Pour enough sauce into a lightly greased 10-cup casserole to coat the bottom.
6. Layer mushrooms, spaghetti, and turkey over sauce.
7. Pour remainder of sauce over turkey.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes, or until mixture bubbles.
